text:
From this environment, `portal.stf.jus.br` TLS verification can fail because the site doesn't provide a complete intermediate chain, causing Python/requests `CERTIFICATE_VERIFY_FAILED`.
Prefer a browser-based fallback (Playwright/Chromium) for STF ingestion, and avoid relying on plain HTTP clients alone.
When installing Playwright binaries programmatically, use `sys.executable -m playwright ...` (not a bare `playwright` binary) to work reliably across environments/venvs.
